subcodes.first_line: O thou servant of the Desired One, Mirza 'Abdu'l-Majid! Praise hath been rendered for thy radiant countenance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حضرت مقصود جناب میرزا عبدالمجید ستایش از افروختگی روی تو نمود که
subcodes.subjects: @methods of teaching the Cause, @praise and encouragement, @being a source of light; guidance, @characteristics and conduct of true believers
